{"society_power": 5.5, "state_power": 4.0, "society_change": 1.5, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "1943 National Pact and independence crisis mobilization", "reasoning": "Cross-confessional mass mobilization in 1943 and the National Pact markedly strengthened society's self-organization, while independence produced only a formally sovereign yet deliberately thin, confessionally captured state whose real capacity remained weak."}
